title: Continuous Integration Quality Gate Pipeline
deviation_notes: Wires the existing manual quality gates (npm run typecheck / npm test / npm run build) into GitHub Actions; the remote is github.com/bodangren/advantage-game-art-pack.
Live/external tests (*.live.test.ts) and Forge MCP replay must be gated behind opt-in conditions so CI is green without secrets or external services.
Starts from the green baseline delivered by test_suite_repair_20260724; once green, CI enforces it continuously. Does not modify automation-supervisor.py.
